channel.title: NDTV News Search Records Found 1000
channel.description: NDTV.com provides the latest information from and in-depth coverage of India and the world. Find breaking news, India news, top stories, elections, politics, business, cricket, movies, lifestyle, health, live TV, videos, photos and more.

item.title: The New Cold War: America Invents, China Deploys

media:content.media:description: A Long March-10B carrier rocket lifts off from Hainan Commercial Spacecraft Launch Site in China

item.description: The contest has shifted from who discovers to who can industrialise faster
item.content:encoded: The contest has shifted from who discovers to who can industrialise faster

item.title: China's New Mega Dam Near Indian Border Poses Huge Geological Risk: Report

media:content.media:description: Construction work of a dam in Yarlung Tsangpo River has picked up pace in recent months

item.description: China is building the world's largest hydroelectric dam in the lower parts of the Yarlung Tsangpo River in Tibet, about 50 kilometres from the border with India.
item.content:encoded: China is building the world's largest hydroelectric dam in the lower parts of the Yarlung Tsangpo River in Tibet, about 50 kilometres from the border with India.

item.title: Meta Discontinues AI Image Feature Days After Backlash Over Privacy Concerns

media:content.media:description: The feature faced backlash over privacy concerns.

item.description: Meta, owner of Facebook and Instagram, had launched Muse Image on Tuesday, its first image-generation model from Meta Superintelligence Labs.
item.content:encoded: Meta, owner of Facebook and Instagram, had launched Muse Image on Tuesday, its first image-generation model from Meta Superintelligence Labs.

item.title: "1,000 Missiles Loaded": Trump Amid Iranians' Call For His Assassination

media:content.media:description: During Khamenei's funeral, mourners repeatedly held posters calling for Trump to be killed.

item.description: Trump made the comments on his Truth Social after senior US officials demanded that Iran make a public statement saying the Strait of Hormuz is open and that ships crossing the vital corridor won't be attacked any longer.
item.content:encoded: Trump made the comments on his Truth Social after senior US officials demanded that Iran make a public statement saying the Strait of Hormuz is open and that ships crossing the vital corridor won't be attacked any longer.

item.title: "J&K Integral Part Of India": Indian Diplomat Flags Wrong Map At Dhaka Event

media:content.media:description: Former Bangladesh High Commissioner to India Ahmed Tariq Karim and Indian diplomat Pooja Kumari Jha

item.description: The Indian diplomat, Pooja Kumari Jha, was attending a seminar at the Bangladesh Institute of International and Strategic Studies (BIISS) in Dhaka.
item.content:encoded: The Indian diplomat, Pooja Kumari Jha, was attending a seminar at the Bangladesh Institute of International and Strategic Studies (BIISS) in Dhaka.

item.title: Martha Lillard, Last US Polio Patient Using Iron Lung, Dies At 78

media:content.media:description: McVey attributes her sister's death to the effects of long-haul COVID-19.

item.description: Martha Lillard slept in the iron lung cylinder that encased her body as the air pressure in the chamber forced air in and out of her lungs.
item.content:encoded: Martha Lillard slept in the iron lung cylinder that encased her body as the air pressure in the chamber forced air in and out of her lungs.

item.title: PM Modi Receives Ceremonial Maori Welcome During New Zealand Visit

media:content.media:description: PM Narendra Modi arrived in Auckland on Friday evening for the final leg of his three-nation visit

item.description: The ceremony featured a traditional Maori powhiri, a significant indigenous welcome that reflects New Zealand's rich cultural heritage and values.
item.content:encoded: <iframe title="Player" class="head-story__img img__full lazyload" height="300" scrolling=no frameborder=no src="about:blank" data-src="https://www.ndtv.com/video/embed-player/id/1125775/play-via-app-wap?pWidth=100&pHeight=100&embed_type=story&site=classic&autostart=1"> </iframe>The ceremony featured a traditional Maori powhiri, a significant indigenous welcome that reflects New Zealand's rich cultural heritage and values.

item.title: PM Modi Praises India-New Zealand Trade Agreement As "Historic Milestone"

media:content.media:description: PM Modi arrived in Auckland on Friday and was greeted by PM Christopher Luxon

item.description: Prime Minister Narendra Modi said the warmth shown by the people of New Zealand towards India was deeply moving and described the visit as a defining moment in bilateral ties.
item.content:encoded: Prime Minister Narendra Modi said the warmth shown by the people of New Zealand towards India was deeply moving and described the visit as a defining moment in bilateral ties.

item.title: Venezuela Earthquake Death Count Crosses 4,000, Thousands Still Missing

media:content.media:description: At least 4,118 people were killed and 16,740 injured in the back-to-back June 24 quakes.

item.description: The stronger 7.5 magnitude quake -- the biggest in Venezuela in over a century -- struck 39 seconds after the first 7.2 magnitude shock, flattening entire high-rise apartment blocks to layers of rubble.
item.content:encoded: The stronger 7.5 magnitude quake -- the biggest in Venezuela in over a century -- struck 39 seconds after the first 7.2 magnitude shock, flattening entire high-rise apartment blocks to layers of rubble.

item.title: US-Iran War Live Updates: Iran Reports Fresh American Strikes, Trump Updates Netanyahu

media:content.media:description: The US also revoked a sanctions waiver for Iranian oil.

item.description: Iran-US War News LIVE: The US military has hit a variety of military sites and port facilities after blaming Iran for targeting several merchant vessels off the coast of Oman, sparking Iranian fire then as well.
item.content:encoded: Iran-US War News LIVE: The US military has hit a variety of military sites and port facilities after blaming Iran for targeting several merchant vessels off the coast of Oman, sparking Iranian fire then as well.

item.title: Meta AI Image Detector Fails To Identify Some Of Its Own Cropped AI Pictures

media:content.media:description: Meta said the tool was a preview.

item.description: In an analysis of 40 images generated using Muse Image, Reuters found the detection tool verified all of the original AI-generated images but failed to verify 55% of the same images after they were cropped.
item.content:encoded: In an analysis of 40 images generated using Muse Image, Reuters found the detection tool verified all of the original AI-generated images but failed to verify 55% of the same images after they were cropped.

item.title: Pak Forces Kills 75 Rebels In Balochistan After Cops Blindfolded, Shot Dead

media:content.media:description: Nine police officers and 15 attackers were killed in the initial assault. (Representational)

item.description: The attackers abducted 18 police officers, who were later found blindfolded and shot dead after fleeing into nearby mountains.
item.content:encoded: The attackers abducted 18 police officers, who were later found blindfolded and shot dead after fleeing into nearby mountains.

item.title: Ex-UK MP Found Dead At Home With 'Serious Injuries', Murder Suspect Arrested

media:content.media:description: The killing was not believed to be an act of terror.

item.description: Ann Widdecombe, 78, was found dead on Thursday in her Haytor Vale home on the edge of Dartmoor National Park in southwest England after sustaining what police said were "serious injuries."
item.content:encoded: Ann Widdecombe, 78, was found dead on Thursday in her Haytor Vale home on the edge of Dartmoor National Park in southwest England after sustaining what police said were "serious injuries."

item.title: Iran's Big "Reciprocal Action" Warning To US As Trump Says "Deal Over"

media:content.media:description: Iran said that it has "no trust" in the US.

item.description: The Iranian ministry also denied Trump's claims that Tehran had requested the US to continue the talks.
item.content:encoded: <iframe title="Player" class="head-story__img img__full lazyload" height="300" scrolling=no frameborder=no src="about:blank" data-src="https://www.ndtv.com/video/embed-player/id/1125799/play-via-app-wap?pWidth=100&pHeight=100&embed_type=story&site=classic&autostart=1"> </iframe>The Iranian ministry also denied Trump's claims that Tehran had requested the US to continue the talks.

item.title: New Zealand's Sky Tower Lights Up In Tricolour To Welcome PM Modi

media:content.media:description: Prime Minister Narendra Modi called his visit to New Zealand "historic"

item.description: PM Modi thanked New Zealand Prime Minister Christopher Luxon for welcoming him at the airport and highlighted that his visit is the first Indian Prime Ministerial visit to the nation in four decades.
item.content:encoded: PM Modi thanked New Zealand Prime Minister Christopher Luxon for welcoming him at the airport and highlighted that his visit is the first Indian Prime Ministerial visit to the nation in four decades.

item.title: 10 Dead As Small Plane Crashes In Bahamas, Airline's Ops Grounded

media:content.media:description: The victims have not been publicly identified.

item.description: The deadly incident happened in North Andros, located in waters just west of Nassau, the archipelago's capital.
item.content:encoded: The deadly incident happened in North Andros, located in waters just west of Nassau, the archipelago's capital.

item.title: US Targets Dubai-Based "Key Financier" For Mojtaba Khamenei

media:content.media:description: Iran's Ali Ansari is described in a US Treasury statement as a key financier for Mojtaba Khamenei.

item.description: Iranian national Ali Ansari is described in a US Treasury statement as a "key financier" for the Islamic republic's supreme leader, Mojtaba Khamenei.
item.content:encoded: Iranian national Ali Ansari is described in a US Treasury statement as a "key financier" for the Islamic republic's supreme leader, Mojtaba Khamenei.

item.title: US Court Delays Decision On Murder Trial Over Charlie Kirk Killing

media:content.media:description: Prosecutors allege Robinson was in a romantic relationship with his transgender roommate.

item.description: A US judge said Friday the preliminary hearing into the killing of right-wing influencer Charlie Kirk will be taken up again in September, delaying a decision on whether there is enough evidence to hold a murder trial.
item.content:encoded: A US judge said Friday the preliminary hearing into the killing of right-wing influencer Charlie Kirk will be taken up again in September, delaying a decision on whether there is enough evidence to hold a murder trial.

item.title: Apple Sues OpenAI, Two Former Employees For Trade Secrets Theft

media:content.media:description: More than 400 former Apple employees now work for OpenAI, Apple said in the filing.

item.description: The complaint, filed in the US District Court for the Northern District of California, alleges a coordinated effort to steal Apple's confidential information, including product designs, manufacturing processes and supply chain strategies.
item.content:encoded: <iframe title="Player" class="head-story__img img__full lazyload" height="300" scrolling=no frameborder=no src="about:blank" data-src="https://www.ndtv.com/video/embed-player/id/1125796/play-via-app-wap?pWidth=100&pHeight=100&embed_type=story&site=classic&autostart=1"> </iframe>The complaint, filed in the US District Court for the Northern District of California, alleges a coordinated effort to steal Apple's confidential information, including product designs, manufacturing processes and supply chain strategies.

item.title: Iran Must End Hormuz Ship Attacks, Keep Lanes Open: US Officials

media:content.media:description: Three ships were attacked this week, prompting Trump to respond with US strikes on Iranian targets.

item.description: Iran has told Washington that recent attacks on shipping in the Strait were from "an errant part of their system," one senior official said.
item.content:encoded: Iran has told Washington that recent attacks on shipping in the Strait were from "an errant part of their system," one senior official said.
